statement.p: On a cold snowy day, the temperature in your home is a cozy 70\,^{\circ}F\text{,} but then you lose power and heating. Your home temperature begins to drop at a rate of 10\,\frac{^{\circ}F}{\text{hour}}\text{.} How long will it take before your home is 40\,^{\circ}F\text{?} Write an equation to model this scenario. There is no need to solve it.
